cardDesc.fuelLevel: Shows the current fuel tank level as a percentage.
cardDesc.fuelRange: Estimated remaining driving range based on the current fuel level.
cardDesc.evBattery: State of charge as a percentage. On a PHEV or BEV this is your electric range gauge. On an HEV the hybrid battery is small and managed automatically by the car, so the exact value is less meaningful day-to-day.
cardDesc.charging: Indicates whether the car is currently charging.
cardDesc.odometer: Total distance the car has traveled since manufacture.
cardDesc.battery12v: Voltage of the 12V auxiliary battery that powers the car's electronics.
cardDesc.doors: Lock status and open or closed state of all doors, bonnet and boot.
cardDesc.windows: Open or closed status of all four windows.
cardDesc.sunRoof: Whether the sunroof is currently open or closed.
cardDesc.climate: Climate control status including temperature and seat heating settings.
cardDesc.hvBattery: High-voltage battery details: kWh remaining, total capacity, voltage, current and live power flow. On a PHEV or BEV it also shows the charge-current-limit control. On an HEV it lets you see regeneration and motor-assist activity in real time.
cardDesc.findMyCar: Activate the horn and lights to help locate your car in a parking area.
cardDesc.lights: On or off status of high beam, low beam and sidelights.
cardDesc.efficiencyDistance: Total distance driven so far today.
cardDesc.efficiencyEnergy: Total electrical energy that passed through the high-voltage battery since midnight, in watt-hours. On a BEV this equals battery charge consumed. On a PHEV it covers both grid charge and regeneration. On an HEV it reflects the energy cycled through the small hybrid battery.
cardDesc.efficiencyCharge: Distance driven since the last charge session.
cardDesc.efficiencyRatio: Energy today divided by distance today (Wh/km). Lower is better. On a BEV or PHEV in EV mode this translates directly to electricity cost per km. On an HEV it shows how efficiently the hybrid system ran - motorway driving gives a lower figure than stop-start city traffic. When no driving data is available yet, HEV and PHEV fall back to showing estimated fuel economy (km/%) derived from the car's own range computer: higher is more efficient.
cardDesc.speed: Current vehicle speed as reported by the gateway.
cardDesc.activeTrip: Distance covered in the current trip while active, or the distance of the last completed trip when parked.
cardDesc.onlineStatus: Whether the car is currently reachable via the SAIC cloud. Goes offline when the car is parked and the gateway stops polling.
cardDesc.remainingCharge: Estimated minutes remaining until the battery reaches the configured charge limit. Only relevant for PHEV and BEV while charging.
cardDesc.chargingSession: Live onboard-charger data: AC power (single or three-phase), cable lock status and charging type. Only relevant for PHEV and BEV.
cardDesc.batteryHeating: High-voltage battery pre-heating status and schedule. Warming the battery before a charge session improves charging speed in cold weather. Only relevant for PHEV and BEV.
cardDesc.vehicleDiagram: Top-down overview of the vehicle. Tyre pressure dots are colour-coded: green is healthy, orange is low, red is critically low. Open doors, the bonnet and the boot are marked with a lock-open icon. Light beams are shown when any lights are on. Fuel level and EV battery percentage appear at the front and rear respectively when data is available.

cardDesc.distanceInRange: Total distance across all trips in the selected time window.
cardDesc.avgTripLength: Average distance per trip in the selected period.
cardDesc.climateUsage: Percentage of recorded snapshots during which remote climate preconditioning was active. Does not reflect in-car A/C usage while driving.
cardDesc.commutePattern: The hour of day with the most trip starts in the selected period - your most common time to drive.
cardDesc.batteryVoltageTrend: Change in average 12V battery voltage from the start to the end of the selected period. Shows current voltage when less than two days of data are available.
cardDesc.parkingLocations: Number of distinct parking spots used across all trips in the selected period, based on rounded GPS coordinates.
cardDesc.electricShare: Estimated share of today's driving on electric power, derived from km since last charge versus total km today. Only meaningful for PHEV, where the battery can be charged from the grid.

chartDesc.evChart: Daily average EV battery state-of-charge over the selected period.
chartDesc.tyreChart: Daily average tyre pressure per wheel over the selected period. Typical passenger-car range is 2.0 – 3.0 bar.
chartDesc.hybridSocChart: Daily average EV battery and fuel level over the selected period. Lets you compare how both energy sources change together.
chartDesc.dailyKwhChart: Estimated kWh consumed from the EV battery per day. Past days show the cumulative peak for that day; today shows only the net increase since midnight, or since the last counter reset.

diagram.infoTyreDesc: Colour-coded dots at each wheel corner show the current pressure. Green means healthy (>= 2.6 bar), orange means low (2.2 – 2.6 bar) and red means critically low (< 2.2 bar).
diagram.infoDoorsDesc: A lock-open icon appears over any door, the bonnet or the boot that is currently open.
diagram.infoLightsDesc: Light beam shapes are drawn when high beam, low beam or sidelights are active.
diagram.infoLevelDesc: When data is available, the fuel level percentage appears at the front and the EV battery percentage appears at the rear of the diagram.
diagram.infoChargingDesc: A cable is shown below the battery indicator when the charger is connected. When actively charging, the cable animates with flowing dashes to show energy entering the car.

control.findMyCarConfirm: This will activate the horn and lights to help locate your car. Continue?

trips.title: Trip history
trips.speedOverlayDesc: Visible when a single trip is selected

install.title: Install GarageStack
install.description: Add GarageStack to your home screen for the best experience.

push.permissionDenied: Permission denied — allow notifications in your browser settings
push.desc: Receive a push notification on this device when important vehicle events occur, such as charging completing or a door left open.

auth.subtitle: Sign in with your MG account credentials

theme.title: Appearance
theme.lightDesc: Switch between dark and light theme

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.cardInfoIconsDesc: Show the info button on each card

vehicleType.title: Vehicle type
vehicleType.notDetected: Not detected yet -start the gateway to auto-detect

demo.banner: Demo mode - displaying sample data only
